title: UK Airspace Design Support Fund rules and eligibility criteria

sections.heading: What happened
sections.content: Who can apply to the UK Airspace Design Support Fund and fund administration rules. The UK Airspace Design Support Fund supports airports that are progressing airspace change proposals as part of the national airspace modernisation programme. who can apply to the fund what costs the fund covers how to assess applications and disburse the funding The rules and eligibility criteria are draft / proposed, subject to the modification procedure to amend the NATS En Route PLC (NERL) licence and Subsidy Control Act principles assessment.

sections.heading: Key details
sections.content:
The fund will be financed alongside the UK Airspace Design Service through a newly introduced UK airspace design charge, paid by commercial airlines.

UK Airspace Design Support Fund rules and eligibility criteria
